"'''Storm Fleet Warnings'''" is a short story published in ''[[Star Wars: Short Story Collection]]'', written by [[Jude Watson]] and presented by [[Scholastic]]. It details the [[Storm Fleet]] and the [[Battle of the Llon Nebulae]].

==Plot summary==
During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] happen upon a disguised [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] fleet known as the [[Storm Fleet]] at the [[Llon Nebulae/Legends|Llon Nebulae]], and track it to [[Kronex spaceport]]. There, with the help of an old contact of Kenobi's, [[Fizz (individual)|Fizz]], the two [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] uncover the fleet's intended destination: the planet [[Cyphar/Legends|Cyphar]], with the presumed purpose of intimidating the local populace into allowing the Separatists to establish a base there.

When the Storm Fleet takes off into space and towards its intended destination, Skywalker, against his master's will, [[Battle of the Llon Nebulae|approaches]] the ships in his starfighter, pursuing them into a nearby [[asteroid field]], destroying two of them, and further hindering the Separatist operation.

==Continuity==
Before the advent of ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars]]'', ''Storm Fleet Warnings'' was established as taking place in [[22 BBY/Legends|21.67 BBY]],<ref name="The New Essential Chronology">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> approximately 4 months after the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|First Battle of Geonosis]].
